intake.user_request: Fix IMP-CORE-089: rag-search is in PROJECT_DIR_FLAG_CMDS (auto-injects --project-dir from top-level field) AND CMD_OPTIONS['rag-search'] has an explicit --project-dir entry widget, causing duplicate --project-dir args when both fields are populated.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single-file fix in tools/coderef_ui.py. Remove redundant --project-dir widget from CMD_OPTIONS['rag-search'] since PROJECT_DIR_FLAG_CMDS handles it. 2-line change.

in_scope: tools/coderef_ui.py — remove duplicate --project-dir entry from CMD_OPTIONS['rag-search']
Smoke test: verify _build_args() for rag-search emits --project-dir once

constraints: rag-search must still receive --project-dir when Project Dir field is populated
No change to POSITIONAL_PROJECT_DIR_CMDS or PROJECT_FLAG_CMDS routing logic
All other rag-search CMD_OPTIONS widgets must remain intact
